codeSystems.name: HeartlandEvidenceLevelVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Evidence Level Value Set
codeSystems.description: All evidence level codes (established | emerging | pragmatic).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandImplementationTierVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Implementation Tier Value Set
codeSystems.description: All facility implementation tier codes (tier-1-minimal | tier-2-standard | tier-3-advanced).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandMonitoringObservationCodeVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Monitoring Observation Code Value Set
codeSystems.description: LOINC codes for the four observations captured by the HEARTLAND remote monitoring kit per Module 5: body weight (digital scale), systolic and diastolic blood pressure (BP monitor), and oxygen saturation (pulse oximeter, when indicated).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandMonitoringTrackVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Monitoring Track Value Set
codeSystems.description: All remote monitoring track codes (digital-track-a | analog-track-b).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandRiskTierVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Risk Tier Value Set
codeSystems.description: All risk tier codes from the HEARTLAND risk score (low | moderate | high).
